title: Your Roadmap Title
shortDescription: A concise summary of what this roadmap covers (10-200 characters).
description: A detailed description explaining what learners will gain from this roadmap, who it's for, and what makes it valuable.

sections.title: Foundation & Setup
sections.description: Build your foundation — learn the basics, set up your environment, and understand core concepts.

topics.title: Introduction & Overview
topics.description: Get a high-level understanding of the field, its career prospects, and what you'll build by the end.

project.title: Environment Setup
project.description: Install all necessary tools, configure your editor, and create your first 'Hello World' project to verify everything works.

topics.title: Core Concepts
topics.description: Learn the fundamental building blocks that everything else is built upon.

project.title: Mini Project: Basics
project.description: Build a small project that uses all the core concepts you just learned. Keep it simple but functional.

sections.title: Intermediate Skills
sections.description: Level up your skills with more complex patterns, tools, and real-world techniques.

topics.title: Advanced Patterns
topics.description: Learn industry-standard patterns and best practices used in production codebases.

project.title: Real-World Mini App
project.description: Build a practical application that demonstrates the patterns you've learned. This should be something you could show in a portfolio.

sections.title: Advanced & Production
sections.description: Master advanced topics, deployment, testing, and production-grade practices.

topics.title: Testing & Quality
topics.description: Learn how to write tests, maintain code quality, and set up CI/CD pipelines.

project.title: Capstone Project
project.description: Build a complete, production-ready application with tests, proper architecture, and deployment. This is your portfolio showpiece.

seo.title: Your Roadmap Title — Complete Learning Path
seo.description: Step-by-step roadmap to master this skill with curated resources, projects, and timelines.
